# A D Capital Investment

> A D Capital Investment is an AMFI-certified mutual fund distributor (ARN No. 314520) based in Nagapattinam, Tamil Nadu, India. We provide expert financial advisory services including mutual fund investments, financial planning, insurance solutions, wealth management, and NRI investment services across India and Saudi Arabia.

## About Us

- **Company Name:** A D Capital Investment
- **Type:** Mutual Fund Distributor & Financial Advisory
- **AMFI ARN:** 314520
- **Website:** https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com
- **Email:** connect@adcapitalinvestment.com
- **Phone (India):** +91-74025-15544, +91-86678-47016
- **Phone (Saudi Arabia):** +966-541180621
- **Address:** 1/95, Post Office Road, Vettaikaraniruppu, Nagapattinam, Tamil Nadu - 611112, India

## Our Services

- [Mutual Fund Investments](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/services/mutual-fund): Curated mutual fund schemes across equity, debt, and hybrid categories
- [Financial Planning](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/financial-planning): Comprehensive financial planning for individuals and families
- [Goal Planning](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/plan-a-goal): Retirement, child education, and custom goal-based investment planning
- [Wealth Management](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/wealth-management): Private wealth management for high-net-worth clients
- [Insurance Services](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/services/insurance-renewal): Life, health, motor, and business insurance
- [NRI Corner](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/faq/nri-corner): Investment solutions for Non-Resident Indians
- [GIFT City Services](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/services/gift-city): GIFT City IFSC investment opportunities

## Tools & Calculators

- [SIP Calculator](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/systematic-investment-plan-calculator): Calculate potential SIP returns
- [Become a Crorepati](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/become-a-crorepati): Plan your path to ₹1 crore
- [Lumpsum Target Calculator](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/lumpsum-target-calculator): Calculate lumpsum investment outcomes
- [Children Education Planner](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/children-education-planner): Plan education expenses
- [Human Life Value Calculator](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/human-life-value-calculator): Estimate life insurance needs
- [Asset Allocation](https://www.adcapitalinvestment.com/tools-and-calculators/asset-allocation): Recommended portfolio allocation
